1.$description: Minimal elevation on dark: a lit top edge in cool sky light (black drops cannot read on a near-black canvas, so elevation renders as light)

soft.$description: Soft elevation on dark: lit top edge, cool hairline rim, soft drop for photographic backdrops

com.cucusa.platform.css: inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-sky-5) 14%, transparent), 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-sky-5) 6%, transparent), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55)

hover.$description: Hover state elevation on dark: brighter lit edge and rim, deeper drop

com.cucusa.platform.css: inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-sky-5) 18%, transparent), 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-sky-5) 8%, transparent), 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6)

2.$description: High elevation on dark for cards and slides: brightest lit edge, cool rim, deepest drop

com.cucusa.platform.css: inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-sky-5) 22%, transparent), 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-sky-5) 10%, transparent), 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65)

0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent) 40%, transparent), 0 0 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-magenta-3) 25%, transparent), 0 0 24px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-magenta-1) 15%, transparent)
